hero.description: Bridging the gap between scalable software engineering and robust IT infrastructure.

about.title: About
about.p1: Highly adaptable IT professional and development leader with over 8 years of enterprise experience bridging software engineering and IT infrastructure. Currently serving as Head of Application Development, specializing in Full-Stack Web Development (<accent1>Next.js, ASP.NET Core</accent1>) and DevOps methodologies.
about.p2: Proven track record of architecting scalable applications, orchestrating automated deployments to high-availability web servers (<accent2>IIS, Nginx</accent2>), and managing CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps.
about.p3: Brings deep foundational expertise in optimizing enterprise virtualization, deploying Windows Server and Linux environments across VMs and bare-metal servers, and AI Deep Learning research.

job1.title: Head of Application Development Service
job1.desc1: Managing a team of developers for maintaining and updating existing applications.
job1.desc2: Deployment of DevOps solution (Azure DevOps): Git for code management, CI/CD pipelines, and Test Plans.
job1.desc3: Mobile and web application development (alsolb-dz.com — Flutter & ASP.NET Core REST API).
job1.desc4: Built SEGAO and GDC web apps (ASP.NET Core MVC), Bug tracker and Payroll/Career management (Next.js + ASP.NET Core API).

job2.title: IT Manager — African Cup of Nations U17 (CAN U17)
job2.desc1: Managed a team of 4 people for the tournament IT operations.
job2.desc2: Network deployment (wired and access points), desktops and printers configuration.
job2.desc3: Printed and distributed score sheets during the games (VIP and Media). Troubleshot IT problems in the stadium.

job3.title: IT Manager — African Nations Championship (CHAN)
job3.desc1: Managed a team of 10 people for the championship IT operations.
job3.desc2: Network deployment (wired and access points), desktops and printers configuration.
job3.desc3: Printed and distributed score sheets during the games (VIP and Media). Supported and troubleshot IT problems.

job4.title: System Engineer
job4.desc1: Installing, administering, maintaining, and monitoring systems (StoreOnce, Veeam, HPE Simplivity, AD, Exchange, SAP, Endpoint Protection, SCCM, Nagios).
job4.desc2: Administering and managing virtualization systems (vCenter, VMware ESXi 7.0). SAP Basis: user administration and authorization.
job4.desc3: Managed backups and recoveries. User administration and security policies (GPO).
job4.desc4: Server deployment automation using Vagrant. Development of scripts for task automation and reporting.

job5.title: AI Journalism Research Member
job5.company: AI Journalism for Research and Telework (Dubai)
job5.desc1: Forecasting and fake news detection using hybrid deep learning methods.
job5.desc2: Contributed to research on artificial intelligence applications in journalism.

job6.title: Micro-Enterprise Owner & IT Consultant
job6.desc1: Surveillance camera installation (analog and IP), alarm and fire systems (Ajax).
job6.desc2: Interphone and videophone systems. Application development (Web, Mobile, Desktop). Domotics installation (KNX).
job6.desc3: Implementation of IT system in a medical clinic (2023): LAN network (Cisco 2950), IP cameras, Proxmox VE 6.2 with Bahmni clinic management.
job6.desc4: Domain deployment in Aalafelchark factory (2021): Active Directory on Windows Server 2019, DNS, DHCP, GPO, NAS, and backup solution.

job7.title: Trainee
job7.desc1: Repair of computer equipment (central units, screens, printers).

project8.description: End-to-end IT system implementation: LAN network, IP surveillance, Proxmox VE hypervisor with Bahmni clinic management.
